content: هِييَ بِتِمشي وَرَاهُ في كُلِّ هِتَّة زَيّ اَلرّيحَة اَلْوَحشَة
translations: eng:she follows him everywhere like a bad smell

transcriptions.arabizi: hiyya bitimshi warraa|uh fi kullahitta zayiilreeha ilwihsha
